description: Added filterByPermission that uses client-side role check
diff_summary: Added filterByPermission function that filters documents client-side based on user role

edge_cases: getDocuments still returns all documents including private ones — filtering happens after full data is fetched; malicious client can bypass filter
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Permission filtering should happen in the database query (server-side), not after fetching all data; role string comparison is fragile (case sensitivity, typos)
ground_truth.next_prompt: Can we move the permission check to the database query so we don't over-fetch?
ground_truth.notes: Client-side security filtering is a security anti-pattern
